task_completion.description: The root pom.xml is updated to be a parent POM that includes the three submodules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The root pom.xml file is visible in an editor or terminal output, showing <packaging>pom</packaging> and a <modules> section containing <module>math</module>, <module>strings</module>, and <module>collections</module>.

task_completion.description: Three submodule directories named 'math', 'strings', and 'collections' are created in the project root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, IDE project view, or terminal 'ls' output shows the folders 'math', 'strings', and 'collections' inside the java-library directory.

task_completion.description: Each submodule has its own pom.xml referencing the root parent POM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of a submodule's pom.xml (e.g., math/pom.xml) are visible, showing a <parent> section that references the artifactId 'java-library'.

task_completion.description: Source files are moved to the standard Maven layout within their respective submodule directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file tree or terminal output shows the Java files located in paths like 'math/src/main/java/com/library/math/MathUtils.java', 'strings/src/main/java/com/library/strings/StringUtils.java', etc.

task_completion.description: Test files are moved to the standard Maven layout within their respective submodule directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file tree or terminal output shows test files located in paths like 'math/src/test/java/com/library/math/...', 'strings/src/test/java/com/library/strings/...', etc.

task_completion.description: The 'mvn clean install' command succeeds from the root directory with all tests passing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output shows the execution of 'mvn clean install' (or similar full build command) with a Reactor Summary displaying 'SUCCESS' for the parent project and all three submodules ('math', 'strings', 'collections'), along with logs indicating tests were run and passed.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the file system to restructure the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual IDE file tree updates, terminal 'mv' or 'mkdir' commands, or git status outputs showing file deletions from the root and additions to the submodules, rather than just printing a fake success message.

integrity.description: The agent ran the actual Maven build command to verify the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine Maven build logs in the terminal, including downloading dependencies, compiling sources, running surefire plugin for tests, and the final reactor summary.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the test requirement by skipping tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the Maven command executed does NOT include flags like '-DskipTests' or '-Dmaven.test.skip=true'. The logs must show 'Tests run: X, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/IdeaProjects/java-library. Expected submodules: 'math', 'strings', 'collections'. The root POM must have packaging 'pom' and list the 3 modules. Each module must have its own pom.xml with a parent reference to 'java-library'. Source files must be in standard Maven layout (e.g., math/src/main/java/com/library/math/MathUtils.java). The final verification is a successful 'mvn clean install' showing all modules built and tests passed.
